places.name: Oz Park
places.description: This whimsical Oz-themed park had a wonderful impact on the surrounding neighborhood.

places.name: Woolly Mammoth Antiques and Oddities
places.description: This morbid, delightful curiosity shop offers everything from animal bones to human teeth.

places.name: Tiffany Dome
places.description: This massive stained-glass masterpiece is thought to be the largest Tiffany dome in existence.

places.name: Garfield Park Conservatory
places.description: A lush green oasis in the middle of Chicago.

places.name: Willis Tower Glass Platform
places.description: Four glass boxes hover over 1,000 feet in the air to give visitors an unparalleled view of Chicago.

places.name: Shit Fountain
places.description: A giant bronze coil of feces is both a tribute to doggie defecation and a reminder to pick it up.

places.name: Alinea Restaurant
places.description: The subtle science of a master molecular gastronomist.

places.name: Palmer House Hilton
places.description: This historic hotel invented the chocolate brownie.

places.name: Rainbo Club
places.description: Beloved bar home to musicians of all eras and reputations.
